title: ficus stipulosa
intro: Ficus stipulosa, also known as the 'banyan fig', is a species of fig tree native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of ailments including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, contributing to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Ficus stipulosa can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
